zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Hervey II於1330年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利時，他的父親William de Hervey15歲，母親Mary Foliot18歲。他於1350年與Joan de Engaine在英國英格蘭貝德福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1386年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可伯納姆 索普享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Harvey  .

variants.name: Harvey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Hervei, also found as Herveu, Hervé, and Hervi. The name Herveu or Herv(e)i was borne by a number of Bretons at the Norman Conquest and, as such, represents a French form of the Old Breton name Hoiearnviu or Hærviu (see Herve ). Among Normans Herve(i) or Herv(e)i was also a French form of ancient Germanic Hariwic, Herewic (from hari ‘army’ + wīg ‘war’), with intervocalic /w/ becoming /v/ in Old French. The Breton and ancient Germanic names were commonly Latinized as Herve(i)us and Hervic(i)us respectively but, since their most common vernacular forms in Old French were indistinguishable, the Latin forms were also sometimes interchangeable, especially Herveus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirmheadhaigh ‘descendant of Airmheadhach’, a personal name probably meaning ‘esteemed’. It seems to be a derivative of Airmheadh, the name borne by a mythological physician.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchaidh ‘descendant of Earchadh’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Hervey II was born in 1330, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Hervey, was 15 and his mother, Mary Foliot, was 18. He married Joan de Engaine in 1350, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1386, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Hervey II est né en 1330, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Hervey, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mary Foliot, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Joan d’Engaine en 1350, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1386, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England: Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Hervey II 1330 in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Hervey 15 und seine Mutter Mary Foliot 18. Er hat 1350 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Engaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hervey II è nato il nel 1330 nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Hervey, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Mary Foliot, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Engaine nel 1350, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1386, nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hervey IIが1330年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグで生まれた時，父William de Herveyは15歳，母Mary Foliotは18歳であった。1350年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでJoan de Engaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1386年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Hervey II(이)가 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Hervey(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Foliot(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 Joan de Engaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 번함 소에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan de Engaine em 1350, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Hervey II родился в 1330 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Hervey было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Foliot, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Engaine в 1350 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan de Engaine en 1350, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1386, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
